case_title: HAGEN, HEATHER A. VS MODELING ENTERPRISES INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $825.00 FILED BY HAGEN, HEATHER A. AS TO DEFENDANT MODELING ENTERPRISES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MODELING ENTERPRISES INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAGEN, HEATHER A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MODELING ENTERPRISES INC. $825.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $871.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAY-28-1998, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAGEN, HEATHER A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MODELING ENTERPRISES INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
